subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Hearken unto the call of Him Who was and Who shall be, from this Hidden Name that calleth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی ان استمع ندآء ما کان و ما یکون من هذا الاسم المکنون الذی ینادی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
